name: French Buttercream Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, mix together powdered sugar, soda, cream of tartar, salt, margarine, egg, and vanilla until well combined.
2. Gradually add flour to the mixture and blend at low speed. If desired, tint with food coloring using a small amount of each color.
3. Chill dough for 15-30 minutes before shaping.
4. Shape dough into 3/4-inch balls and place on a greased cookie sheet.
5. Flatten each ball slightly with a fork and sprinkle with colored sugars, if using.
6. Bake at 350°F (175°C) for 5-8 minutes or until set but not brown.
7. Allow cookies to stand on the baking sheet for 1 minute before removing them.
